<p align="center">
  I build full stack products end to end, from database performance to the interfaces people actually use.<br/>
  Computer Science graduate and AWS Certified Solutions Architect, currently founding <a href="https://www.racket-vision.com"><b>Racket Vision</b></a>.
</p>

<p align="center">

<br/>

## `~/ whoami`

Full stack engineer who likes owning a product from the schema to the pixels. I move fast, ship to production, and care about the details that make software feel effortless. Recently I have written software at a Fortune 500, a handful of startups, and a nonprofit, and right now I am building a SaaS from zero to paying users.

- **Now:** founding **Racket Vision**, a B2B SaaS live in production with its first shop, 300+ users, and payments through Stripe
- **Recently:** shipped a manufacturing analytics platform at **Medtronic** searching 1M+ records in under 2 seconds
- **Focus:** full stack web, cloud infrastructure, and applied AI
- **Open to:** full time software engineering roles

<br/>

## `~/ projects`

**products**

- **[Racket Vision](https://www.racket-vision.com)** — B2B SaaS replacing pen and paper demo tracking at racket sport shops, live with 300+ users and Stripe payments
- **[Ask the CPA Guy](https://github.com/gbchill/ask-the-cpa-guy)** — web app for submitting accounting and QuickBooks questions to a certified CPA, no account needed, with AI assisted response drafting

**ai / systems**

- **[PhishGuard 360](https://github.com/ashworks1706/PhisGuard-360)** — 3 layer AI phishing defense that won $1,000 at Cyber 360, 94% URL detection with a fine tuned DistilBERT classifier and a RAG based LLM investigator
- **[ChessMate Bot](https://github.com/anshulv12/chess_bot)** — autonomous chess playing robot on a 6 DOF arm using ikpy inverse kinematics, Stockfish, and an ArUco + OpenCV vision pipeline
- **[RISC-V Emulator](https://showcase.asucapstone.com/survey/10635)** — web based RISC-V emulator and MIPS to RISC-V converter built with ASU's School of Computing to teach computer architecture

<br/>
